overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The camera follows a pedestrian through narrow neon-lit streets, across intersections with futuristic traffic, up inclined ramps, and through elevated pedestrian plazas. The environment features dense cyberpunk architecture with holographic advertisements, vending machines, and mixed Japanese-English signage.

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a long brown coat through a narrow neon-lit commercial street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking steadily ahead of camera

concrete bench with trash items scattered nearby
bright pink neon sign reading SIXSH.TS on building facade
tall skyscraper covered in holographic advertisements and digital screens

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a pedestrian through a narrow cyberpunk street lined with glowing vending machines on the left and a concrete bench on the right. Pink and blue neon signs illuminate the scene, including a prominent SIXSH.TS sign, while holographic advertisements cover the distant tower ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes and vehicle traffic

events.description: stepping off sidewalk onto crosswalk to cross the street
green futuristic car passes through the crosswalk from left to right
turning right to ascend the inclined ramp street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and navigating around moving vehicles

pedestrian in green shorts and dark top crossing the street

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing painted on asphalt
teal green sedan with futuristic styling and glowing trim
steep inclined roadway leading upward beneath an overpass

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street, navigating around a passing green car. The environment opens into a wide intersection with the SIXSH.TS sign now visible on the left, before turning to ascend a steep ramp leading under an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: inclined street under concrete overpass with red curbs

events.description: entering covered area beneath the massive concrete overpass
red car passes by on the left while ascending the ramp
exiting covered ramp and approaching concrete stairs on the right

agents.ego_description: walking up the steep inclined street toward the upper level

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving up the ramp ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass covering the roadway above
painted red lines marking the curb edge along the inclined street
purple neon sign reading EL GUAPO on distant building
flight of concrete stairs with red railings leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a massive concrete overpass that shelters the inclined ramp, with red curbs marking the roadside. A red car passes on the left as the character ascends toward a flight of concrete stairs visible ahead on the right, with the EL GUAPO neon sign glowing in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with pharmacy and digital billboards

events.description: ascending concrete stairs to upper pedestrian level
entering open plaza area with commercial storefronts and digital signage

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and traversing the upper level pedestrian area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red top and orange pants walking ahead on the plaza

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying animated advertisement with text THE LOVE
green neon sign reading PHARMACY on building facade
blue neon sign with Japanese text HOテル indicating hotel
small structure with corrugated metal walls and yellow patches
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the concrete stairs with red railings to reach an elevated pedestrian plaza. The area features a large digital billboard displaying an advertisement, a green PHARMACY neon sign, and a Japanese hotel sign. The camera moves past a corrugated metal shack toward another flight of stairs, with an overhead walkway bridge visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow neon-lit alleyway that gradually ascends into an elevated urban plaza. It begins by trailing a pedestrian past glowing vending machines and pink and blue signage, moving toward a distant tower draped in holographic advertisements. As the character steps onto a yellow-striped crosswalk and navigates around a passing green car, the space opens into a wide intersection before turning to climb a steep ramp beneath a massive concrete overpass. The scene then shifts upward along the incline past red curbs and passing traffic, leading toward a flight of concrete stairs illuminated by a distant EL GUAPO sign. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs with red railings to reach a pedestrian plaza filled with digital billboards and Japanese signage, moving past a corrugated metal shack toward an overhead walkway bridge.
